codeReview.summary: The fix closes the prior scrutiny gaps. It adds explicit Store-facing plaintext save/get coverage that relies on generated field-tag registration rather than caller-supplied CryptoContext, and it updates the multi-field runtime test to use generated field-tag marker types instead of raw CryptoTag string literals.

sharedStateObservations.observation: GitNexus availability and staleness handling for test-only review work is still undocumented in mission shared state even though the worker had to fall back to source inspection.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: resolver-store-boundary-proof handoff.discoveredIssues notes the GitNexus index was stale and test functions were not resolvable symbols, while mission AGENTS.md only gives generic GitNexus requirements.

summary: Pass: compared against the original failed feature diff and review, this fix adds the missing Store-boundary proof in core/tests/integration_db.rs:1374 and replaces raw string-tag registration with generated field-tag types in core/tests/sensitive_roundtrip.rs:131. The original blockers are addressed without introducing a parallel API path.
